name: property managers handling 5–15 rental listings/month tool
description: For property managers handling 5–15 rental listings/month, inefficient management causes late tenant responses. We streamline tenant applications instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: inefficient management of tenant applications and property listings
